desc: The world's oldest independent scientific academy, dedicated to promoting excellence in science.

About us
What's new
We are the independent scientific academy of the UK, dedicated to promoting excellence in science for the benefit of humanity.
ANNIVERSARY DAY
Sir Adrian Smith, President of the Royal Society, delivers the Royal Society Anniversary Day Address 2022.
Tweets by @royalsociety
BOOK PRIZE
Dr Henry Gee, author of A (Very) Short History of Life on Earth, is the winner of the 2022 Royal Society Science Book Prize.
CLIMATE CHANGE
COP27: Explore the latest from the Royal Society on climate change, including a summary of three reports released by the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC).
POLICY BRIEFING
This policy briefing explores the challenges and practicalities of storing carbon dioxide underground.
NEWS
The Royal Society has announced the shortlist for the Young People's Book Prize 2022.
Journals
Explore our journals
We publish journals across the entire range of science. Find out more about how to read and submit articles.
Open access
We support open access and all our journals are fully compliant with funder mandates.
Collections
Library & digital archives
Explore the history of science through our rare and intriguing collection of books, archives, paintings, images and artefacts.
Library opening hours
Please check our opening hours over the festive period before planning your visit.
